ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the plant */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the plant */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrants" (
  "quadrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrant */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the quadrant's location */,
  "quadrant_size" REAL /* Size of the quadrant in square meters */,
  "layout_notes" TEXT /* Additional layout notes for the quadrant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quadrant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Dry Season, Moist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method used to apply the treatment */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the treatment applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species being monitored */,
  "quadrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quadrant where the plant is located */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the plant in centimeters */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during data recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_quadrant_id FOREIGN KEY ("quadrant_id") REFERENCES quadrants ("quadrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding growth data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the observation */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of associated media (image, video, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES growth_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species for which the trend is calculated */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of plants for the specified treatment */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded trend */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the plants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_trends_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_trends_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species involved in the project */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "site_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of site conditions */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being monitored */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the site in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity of the site in percentage */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil present at the site */,
  "sunlight" REAL /* Average sunlight exposure in hours per day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_conditions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth data being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (scale of 1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the quality */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES growth_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site in the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
